error_signature: API groups but not the API endpoints
title: Xano plugin not displaying API endpoints
symptom: The Xano source plugin shows API groups but fails to display any API endpoints. This issue started occurring recently for the user.
not_this_if: Endpoints are visible in other environments or plans
root_cause: The issue may arise from an outdated or incorrect Metadata API auth key in the Xano plugin, especially after recent updates to Xano that could affect authentication.
fix_steps: Update the Metadata API auth key
Refresh the plugin to check if endpoints are now visible
agent_instruction: Update the Metadata API auth key in the Xano plugin settings.
